name: King of Wands
summary: Directive mastery of Fire, authority. Set order and direction, steward the realm.
flowText: King of Wands is the wand of fire — Set order and direction; steward the realm.

overview.label: Essence
overview.value: Directive mastery of Fire · authority. Set order and direction · steward the realm.

overview.value: XIX The Sun · VII The Chariot · XVI The Tower
